subparts.text: List various Networking Devices and explain any two of them.
What is the difference between “node-to-node” delivery, “host-to host” delivery and “process-to-process” delivery?
Consider the following message M=1010001101. Calculate the cyclic redundancy check for this message using the divisor polynomial x5+x4+x2+1.
How does the Data link layer handles collisions in Ethernet networks?
What are the Types of Wireless Transmission Media? Explain it.
What is the difference between Port address, Logical address and Physical address? Explain with an example.
Contrast and compare ISO-OSI and TCP/IP models.
Explain the working of Pure and Slotted Aloha. Derive the expression for maximum throughput in case of Slotted Aloha.
Explain the working of Selectively Repeat ARQ with the help of a diagram.
What is the difference between IEEE 802.3, 802.4 and 802.5?
